parentQuestion: A researcher treats cells with a drug that disrupts the Golgi apparatus. Which c...

scaffolds.q: The Golgi apparatus receives proteins from the ___.
scaffolds.explain: Proteins synthesized on rough ER are transported to the Golgi apparatus in vesicles for further modification and sorting. The assembly line flows: ribosome → rough ER → Golgi → destination. Walk through this:, darling.

scaffolds.q: Glycosylation is the process of adding ___ to proteins.
scaffolds.explain: Glycosylation adds carbohydrate chains (sugars) to proteins, affecting their folding, stability, and function. Many glycoproteins are on cell surfaces or secreted. The Golgi is the master glycosylator, darling.
